endpoints.name: All New Horizons artwork
endpoints.description: Get a list of all artwork and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons artwork
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific artwork in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ARTWORK}} with a real artwork.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons bugs
endpoints.description: Get a list of all bugs and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons bug
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific bug in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{BUG}} with a real bug.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons clothing
endpoints.description: Get a list of all clothing items and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons clothing
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific clothing item in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{CLOTHING}} with a real clothing.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons events
endpoints.description: Get a list of events and dates in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*, filterable to specific years, months, or days. Data is available for the current and next year.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons fish
endpoints.description: Get a list of all fish and their details in *New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons fish
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific fish in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FISH}} with a real fish.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons fossil groups or individual fossil
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the fossil groups with their respective individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons fossil group with individual fossils
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific fossil group with their respective individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FOSSIL}} with a real fossil.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons fossil groups
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the fossil groups in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons fossil group
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific fossil group in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FOSSIL_GROUP}} with a real fossil_group.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons fossils
endpoints.description: Get a list of all the individual fossils in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons fossil
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific individual fossil in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FOSSIL}} with a real fossil.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons furniture
endpoints.description: Get a list of all furniture and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons furniture
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific furniture in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{FURNITURE}} with a real furniture.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons interior items
endpoints.description: Get a list of all interior items (flooring, wallpaper, and rugs) and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons interior item
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific interior item in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ITEM}} with a real item.

endpoints.name: Miscellaneous New Horizons items
endpoints.description: Get a list of all miscellaneous items (such as materials, star fragments, fruits, fences, and plants) and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons miscellaneous item
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a miscellaneous item (such as materials, star fragments, fruits, fences, and plants) in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ITEM}} with a real item.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons photos and posters
endpoints.description: Get a list of all character photos+posters and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons photo or poster
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a character photo or poster in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ITEM}} with a real item.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons recipes
endpoints.description: Get a list of all recipes and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons recipe
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific recipe in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{ITEM}} with a real item.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons sea creatures
endpoints.description: Get a list of all sea creatures and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons sea creature
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific sea creature in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{SEA_CREATURE}} with a real sea_creature.

endpoints.name: All New Horizons tools
endpoints.description: Get a list of all tools and their details in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.

endpoints.name: Single New Horizons tool
endpoints.description: Retrieve information about a specific tool in *Animal Crossing: New Horizons*.
endpoints.notes: No authentication required. Replace {{TOOL}} with a real tool.

endpoints.name: Villagers
endpoints.description: This endpoint retrieves villager information from the entire *Animal Crossing* series, with the option to filter by species, personality, game, and/or birthday. Filters use the AND operator (e.g. asking for villagers who have species `frog` and personality `smug` will return all smug frogs). Note that villagers only include the animals that act as residents. Special characters, such as Tom Nook and Isabelle, are not accessed through this endpoint.
